case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. EDMUNDO S. BAYLON et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EDMUNDO BAYLON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. FEE WAIVER DENIED. EDMUNDO S. BAYLON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
